title: Principal Frontend Developer at Hexaware Technologies Global Group

jsonLd.title: Principal Frontend Developer at Hexaware Technologies Global Group
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Frontend Developer looking for your next big career move? Hexaware Technologies Global Group in Allahabad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Hexaware Technologies Global Group:
Hexaware Technologies Global Group is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in REST APIs

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Hexaware Technologies Global Group!
